Struct RectF

FluentGpu.Foundation

FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

Axis-aligned rectangle in DIPs. Local to its node (P8: Bounds are node-LOCAL).

RectF(float, float, float, float)

Axis-aligned rectangle in DIPs. Local to its node (P8: Bounds are node-LOCAL).

Property Value

float

Infinite

A sentinel "unbounded" clip — larger than any real surface; intersecting with it is a no-op.

public static RectF Infinite { get; }

Property Value

RectF

IsEmpty 

public bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsInfinite

True for the Infinite sentinel (a node with no authored clip-rect override).

l float

Returns

RectF

Intersect(in RectF)

The overlap of two rects (an empty rect if they do not overlap). Clip-stack intersection.

public RectF Intersect(in RectF o)

Parameters

o RectF

Returns

RectF

Overlaps(in RectF)

True if the two rects share any area (touching edges do not count).

public bool Overlaps(in RectF o)

Parameters

o RectF

Returns

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
